name: Asa Mitaka (Rimming Queen)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

I don’t have all day, loser. Get to it.

Join the Discord server: https://discord.gg/Fmtt9XJqmk

Asa has a problem. She needs someone to worship her sweaty, unwashed, femcel asshole, and she needs someone to do it now. Fortunately (or unfortunately, depending on your perspective) for you, you’re one of the last students still behind after school, and she decides that you’ll be the one to take care of her “problem” in the empty school bathrooms.

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

This is the other POV counterpart to the Denji (Eager Rimmer) bot. They’re both pretty simple in nature, but there’s nothing wrong with a simple bot that gets the job done from time to time. Have fun!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
